news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Preferred Bank, a major independent commercial bank in California listed on NASDAQ under PFBC, announced the approval of a new $125 million stock repurchase plan by its shareholders. The bank recently finalized its previous stock repurchase initiative on May 8, 2025. This concluded the remaining segment of the $150 million repurchase program endorsed by shareholders in 2023. Over the first and second quarters of 2025, the bank repurchased 818,059 shares for a total of $65.7 million. Throughout the entire $150 million repurchase program, Preferred Bank bought back 2,146,252 shares at an average cost of $70.13 per share.
news.headline: Preferred Bank approved a $125 million stock buyback with prior repurchase totaling $150 million, repurchasing 818,059 shares in 2025.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), a leading global financial technology company behind popular services like Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, has revealed its financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on April 30. The company expressed enthusiasm about its remarkable progress, highlighted by robust performance across its platform. Intuit aims to revolutionize possibilities with artificial intelligence (AI), transforming into a comprehensive hub of AI-powered agents and AI-assisted human professionals to drive the prosperity of individuals and small businesses.
news.headline: Intuit's strong Q3 fiscal 2025 results - Revenue growth - Raises full-year guidance - Positive momentum with AI services.

news.summary: Armada Acquisition Corp. II has officially completed its initial public offering, raising a total of $230 million from investors. The company, based in Philadelphia, successfully closed the offering, marking a significant milestone in its financial journey. This news showcases the strong interest and support from investors towards Armada Acquisition Corp. II, allowing the company to proceed with its strategic plans and objectives.
news.headline: Armada Acquisition Corp. II finalized a $230 million Initial Public Offering in Philadelphia.

news.summary: In Little Compton, Rhode Island, environmental organization Green Oceans, in collaboration with various groups including fishing, tribal, and community organizations, have appealed to U.S. Interior Secretary Doug Burgum to stop all offshore wind development in New England coastal waters. They referenced a Government Accountability Office report highlighting oversight lapses by the Bureau of Ocean Energy Management (BOEM). The coalition is advocating for Secretary Burgum to implement a complete moratorium on offshore wind construction projects in order to conduct a detailed reassessment.
news.headline: Green Oceans and allies call for halt to offshore wind construction in New England due to flawed permitting system.
ROSS STORES WITHDRAWS ANNUAL SALES AND EARNINGS GUIDANCE

news.summary: Autodesk, Inc. reported a strong first quarter of fiscal 2026 with revenue increasing by 15 percent to $1.6 billion. The company's strategic priorities in cloud, platform, and AI have driven long-term shareholder value. The net revenue by product type showed growth in Design, Make, and other categories. Revenue by geographic area reflected growth in the Americas, EMEA, and APAC regions. The company anticipates continued growth in the second quarter and full-year fiscal 2026, with revenue guidance of $1.72-$1.73 billion for Q2 and $6.93-$6.99 billion for the fiscal year. Non-GAAP EPS is expected to be $2.44-$2.48 for Q2 and $9.50-$9.73 for the fiscal year. Free cash flow is projected to be $2.1-$2.2 billion for the fiscal year. Interested individuals can access the full earnings conference call and additional financial information on Autodesk's investor relations website. Key metrics such as billings, recurring revenue, and net revenue retention rate help monitor the company's recurring business strength, while glossary terms help understand financial measures in greater detail.
news.headline: AUTODESK, INC. reported Q1 FY26 revenue grew 15% to $1.6 billion, with high-performing product families and geographic areas. Q2 guidance includes revenue of $1.72-1.73 billion and EPS non-GAAP of $2.44-2.48. Full year outlook anticipates billings of $7.16-7.31 billion and free cash flow of $2.1-2.2 billion.

news.summary: Workday, Inc. reported total revenues of $2.240 billion for the fiscal first quarter ended April 30, 2025, with a 12.6% increase from the same period in 2024. Subscription revenues reached $2.059 billion, up by 13.4% year over year. The operating income was $39 million, impacted by restructuring expenses of $166 million, compared to $64 million in 2024. Non-GAAP operating income was $677 million, representing 30.2% of revenues. Diluted net income per share was $0.25, affected by restructuring expenses of $166 million. The 12-month subscription revenue backlog was $7.63 billion, increasing by 15.6%, while the total subscription revenue backlog was $24.62 billion, marking a 19.1% growth year-over-year. Operating cash flows were $457 million, and free cash flows were $421 million. Workday repurchased around 1.3 million shares of Class A common stock for $293 million. Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities totaled $7.97 billion as of April 30, 2025. Workday continues to reinforce its presence across different industries and geographical locations, introducing new services and expanding its customer base. Their financial outlook shows a subscription revenue of $8.8 billion for fiscal 2026. Workday plans to host a conference call to discuss its financial results and outlook. The company emphasizes the significance of its AI-driven platform and its commitment to growth and efficiency.
news.headline: Workday reports Q1 fiscal 2026 with total revenues of $2.24B (12.6% YoY growth) and subscription revenues at $2.059B (13.4% YoY growth). Operating income was $39M. Cash equivalents were $7.97B. Workday guides Q2 subscription revenue of $2.16B and full-year subscription revenue of $8.8B. Non-GAAP operating margin for FY 2026 is expected to be approximately 28.5%. Workday also repurchased 1.3 million shares of Class A common stock.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Copley Acquisition Corp (NYSE: COPLU) disclosed that investors of the 17,250,000 units from its recent initial public offering, which included 2,250,000 units due to underwriters' overallotment allocation, have the option to individually trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from June 2, 2025. Units not separated will still trade on NYSE as "COPLU," while Class A ordinary shares and warrants will trade as "COPL" and "COPLW" respectively. Only whole warrants, not fractional ones, will be available upon unit separation. Investors should instruct their brokers to contact Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company, the transfer agent, for unit separation.
news.headline: Copley Acquisition Corp to allow separate trading of 17.25M units on June 2, 2025; Class A shares under COPL, warrants under COPLW.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 22, 2025, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (TSX: FRU) shared an update that the Toronto Stock Exchange has given the green light to Freehold's plan to initiate a normal course issuer bid (NCIB). This move signifies Freehold's intention to repurchase a certain number of its own shares from the market.
news.headline: Freehold Royalties Ltd. has received TSX approval to start a normal course issuer bid. May 22, 2025. TSX: FRU.

news.summary: Today, Immix Biopharma released data from its study at the ASCO conference regarding the NEXICART-2 Phase 1/2 clinical trial of NXC-201 in the United States. The results showcased promising effectiveness and a positive safety profile.
news.headline: Immix Biopharma reports positive results for NXC-201 at ASCO, showing strong efficacy in NEXICART-2 trial for AL Amyloidosis.

news.summary: In a crucial Phase 3 trial, Gyre's Hydronidone achieved its primary goal and exhibited substantial fibrosis regression. The trial involved a significant number of participants, with promising results showing a statistical significance in fibrosis reduction. This breakthrough could potentially revolutionize the treatment of liver fibrosis, impacting a substantial population of individuals suffering from this condition.
news.headline: Gyre Therapeutics' Hydronidone successful in Phase 3 trial in China for CHB-associated liver fibrosis with significant regression.

news.summary: In recent developments, statistics revealed that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.2% last month, with a total of 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. This marks a significant improvement in the job market compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, the stock market saw a 2.5% increase in the last trading session, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts predict continued growth in the coming months as the economy recovers from the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: Lakeland Fire + Safety to join 6th Annual CEO Networking Event by Semco Capital.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Iselin-based Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: OTLK) disclosed the initiation of an underwritten public offering for its common stock and related warrants for the treatment of retina diseases with bevacizumab. The offering's completion is subject to market conditions and other factors, with uncertainties regarding its size and terms. The company aims to enhance the care standards for retina diseases utilizing the funds generated from this public offering.
news.headline: Outlook Therapeutics Inc. plans public offering of common stock and warrants, underwritten for the treatment of retina diseases (Nasdaq: OTLK).

news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on May 22, 2025, a campaign titled "America Made Us" was introduced by various brands on social media platforms to kick off the yearlong America250 celebration. These brands will be supplying a fleet of vehicles to transport America250 official events throughout the country. Additionally, there will be limited-edition America250 products released as part of the campaign.
news.headline: Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep®, and Ram partner for America's 250th anniversary, launching "America Made Us" campaign.

news.summary: The Food Allergy Fund has praised the publication of the Make America Healthy Again report for its focus on tackling the childhood chronic disease crisis. The report, released by the MAHA Commission, emphasizes science-driven solutions to health challenges like food allergies. With over 33 million Americans affected, including 1 in 13 children and 1 in xx, food allergies are described as a significant public health emergency.
news.headline: Food Allergy Fund backs efforts to combat chronic diseases, supports Make America Healthy Again report. 33 million Americans, including 1 in 13 children, affected by food allergies.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the country has risen to over 200,000, with a significant increase in the past week. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 5,000, prompting authorities to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. In response to the surge in cases, hospitals are reported to be overwhelmed, with ICU beds reaching almost full capacity. The government is urging the public to adhere to social distancing guidelines and wear masks to prevent further spread of the virus. Furthermore, vaccination efforts are being ramped up, with over 1 million doses administered in the past month alone. The situation remains critical, and the public is advised to stay vigilant and follow health protocols to protect themselves and others.
news.headline: Shares of Fannie and Freddie soar after Trump discusses privatization.

news.headline: Hexaware Technologies opens new office in Chicago at 145 S Wells St, 15th Floor, IL 60606 to accelerate delivery solutions.

news.summary: L3Harris Technologies has recently witnessed an increase in its Relative Strength Rating, soaring to a level exceeding 80. This positive development has escalated its RS Rating to an impressive 82, showcasing strong performance in the market. This upward trend indicates the company's growing strength and resilience in the industry, attracting attention from investors and analysts.
news.headline: L3Harris Technologies stock receives Relative Strength rating boost to 82, reaching 80-plus level.

news.summary: Clean-energy stocks experienced a decline in value on Thursday following the passage of a tax bill in the House. The legislation accelerates the expiration of tax credits, leading to a sell-off in solar power and other clean-energy sectors. The bill, which was narrowly approved early on, caused a particular stock to plummet by 40%. This news resulted in a significant drop in the market value of clean-energy companies.
news.headline: Clean energy stocks plummet after House passes tax bill; one stock drops 40% due to earlier sunset of tax credits.
